name: plugin-eval
description: v0.1.0 — An evaluation harness for plugins that produce AI-generated output. It drives a target plugin natively in an isolated runner, captures what it actually produces, and scores it against a per-target rubric of representative and adversarial scenarios — so you can change a skill, re-run the suite, and see what moved without standing up a full live project. Ships with a strategist target pack. Standalone; part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace.
